case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. FRONTIER PACIFI INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER PACIFI INSURANCE COMPANY CALVIN ELAM BAIL BONDS
